name: PolarPort
description: Service / port registry — provides idempotent port allocation, heartbeat-based liveness tracking, and a thin HTTP API consumable by every Polarisor project. Migrated from SOTAgent's port responsibility per 260505 batch decision A1.

requirements.need: 幂等的端口分配 — 同一服务/项目反复 allocate 拿到同一端口，过期端口自动复活
requirements.approach: better-sqlite3 持久化的 ports 表（service_name + project + device_id + status + last_verified）；POST /api/allocate 优先复用 active 行；preferred_port 必须以 0 或 5 结尾（合规规则保留自 SOTAgent）

features.name: POST /api/allocate
interfaces: POST /api/allocate { service_name, project, preferred_port?, range_start?, range_end? } → { ok, port }
behavior: service_name+project 命中已 active 行 → 返回原端口
命中 released/stale 行且端口未被占用 → 复活并返回
preferred_port 提供且合规且空闲 → 直接占用
都不命中 → 在 [range_start..range_end] 中找以 0/5 结尾且未被占用的端口
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/release
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: 心跳监控 — 30s 没心跳即视为 stale，新分配可以复用 stale 端口
requirements.approach: /api/heartbeat 更新 last_verified；/api/list 标注 active vs stale；后台 cron 周期把超期 active 翻 stale（首版可省，由读时计算）

features.name: POST /api/heartbeat
interfaces: POST /api/heartbeat { port, service_name?, project? } → { ok, last_verified }
behavior: released/stale 端口 + 身份匹配 + 端口未被监听 → 复活
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: GET /api/list
interfaces: GET /api/list?all=true → [{ port, service_name, project, status, last_verified }]
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: PolarPort SDK 为全生态唯一端口分配入口
requirements.approach: 保持 /api 路径与 SOTAgent ports 同形（PolarPort 自己只暴露 /api/allocate 等无 /ports 前缀；通过 SOTAgent facade 透传 /api/ports/*）

features.name: facade 同形契约
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: @polarport/port-sdk 客户端
behavior: SDK 迁移已完成；所有调用方已指向 PolarPort/src/sdk/

requirements.need: preferred 端口预留 — 分配时尊重其他服务的预留，防止跨服务抢占
requirements.approach: preferred_reservations SQLite 表 + allocate() 前置检查 + reserve/release/list HTTP API + 启动时 seed 已知服务

features.name: POST /api/ports/reserve
interfaces: POST /api/ports/reserve { service_name, project, preferred_port } → { ok, service_name, project, preferred_port }
behavior: 预留 (service_name, project) → preferred_port 映射
幂等：同一身份重复预留无副作用
preferred_port 必须以 0 或 5 结尾
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: DELETE /api/ports/reserve/:service_name/:project
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: GET /api/ports/reserved
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: allocate 预留门控
behavior: allocate() 在 honour preferred 前检查 preferred_reservations
如果 preferred_port 被其他 (service_name, project) 预留 → 跳过该端口进入范围扫描
同一身份的预留不影响其自身 allocate
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

depends_on.reason: 启动时通过 SOTAgent port-sdk 取自己的端口（service_name=polar-port）；fallback 到 11050
